summary: Fixes the restart handoff race by forcing this repair through the safer agent-guided update path, then hardening future local restarts.
updatePrompt: Update Planban from piercekearns/planban using the agent-guided path for this repair release, verify the plugin and MCP tools are available, then reopen Planban in the Codex in-app browser.
changelogSummary: This repair release blocks the brittle one-click path from older updater runtimes, then installs a restart helper that waits for the old local server to fully release its port before relaunching Planban.
